Can Redwood issue a credit note for the VAT portion on INV-20261101 so our AP can reprocess the payment? AP has asked for a formal credit note with the original invoice reference, credit note number, and clear wording that VAT is reversed due to EU intra-community supply.

Key goals you called out:
- p95 latency target: <= 140 ms on your 128-token prompts (mix of chat + short completions)
- p99 must be predictable (you called out expensive tail spikes)
- Sustained tokens/sec target for peak 50 concurrent users: ~18k tokens/sec
- SLO tradeoffs: you prefer slightly higher median latency vs >30% cost increase

Date: Sun, 18 Oct 2026 21:42:00 -0700
Subject: Re: Live chat - severe lag / reconnects during evening peak

Hi Mateo / Redwood support,

We started seeing large numbers of reconnects and 5xx responses on our live chat between 19:15-19:45 PDT tonight. Our product team measured p95 at ~1.2s (ok) but p99 shooting up to 8-12s on the streaming endpoint (SSE). That correlates with users reporting long stalls and partial messages. Throughput (messages/min) was normal but tail latency and a small spike in error-rate (0.9%) impacted session continuity.

We rely on the streaming endpoint for our 1:1 clinician chat; customers were frustrated. Can you triage? We need visibility and a mitigation ASAP — this is impacting our retention metrics.
